## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Fieldwire (Hilti) and GrowthX for content marketing and organic growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and optimization services, with a focus on organic growth through high-quality, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Fieldwire has opportunities to improve organic growth, update existing content, and potentially expand their content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [GrowthX's services include an 8-week strategy sprint ($20,000) followed by ongoing growth execution (starting at $15,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in continuing the conversation and exploring potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

## Topics

### Company Introductions and Background

  - [Antonia: 12 years at Hilti, now leading Fieldwire's marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Jo: 5 years at Fieldwire, longest-tenured marketing hire](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Marcel: Extensive background in content marketing and AI-powered growth strategies, founder of GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [AI-powered workflow engine for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Strategy sprint to understand client's business, personas, and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Content audits, competitive analysis, and opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Creation of various content types: blogs, programmatic pages, newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Focus on becoming the best answer on the internet for target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

### Fieldwire's Current Content Situation

  - [732 pages live on the website, including 176 blogs](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Some content hasn't been updated in 2+ years, leading to traffic decline](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Content primarily managed by product marketing and PR teams](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve organic growth and update existing content](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Updating and optimizing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Expanding content strategy to support field marketing events](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Exploring new content types and formats to reach target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Leveraging AI tools to increase efficiency in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)

### Pricing and Timeline

  - [8-week strategy sprint: $20,000](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution: Starting at $15,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Currently booking for August due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Antonia to schedule a follow-up meeting within the next month](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Antonia to involve additional team members in the next discussion](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Marcel to send information about upcoming GrowthX event on July 10th](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up via email with more details and to include Kyle (VP) in future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Both parties to continue exploring potential collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/3HGWNV8V9ReM58G344hdY3oM8o4q6zyV?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
